title: CLAUDE.md
text: Never attempt run bash commands Never try run git commands Never try search outside workspace Never try run cargo commands whatsoever Never use .unwrap() .expect() Never duplicate code unless ask approval get consent Never search code get answer. Always ask help insteaad. Never guess method implementations.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: repository R package arcgisrouting part R-ArcGIS Bridge. provides bindings ArcGIS Routing REST API documented https://developers.arcgis.com/rest/routing/. uses arcgisutils Esri JSON handling including date conversions geoprocessing parameters. use strong type checking via standalone type checks defined R/import-standalone-types-check.R always use rlang low level actions Errors warnings created using cli Wrting duplicate functions duplicate vectors banned validating type object always create reusable function. Comments shuold never describe function call . sapply() banned always use stronger typed apply() lapply() Always use compact() remove NULL elements list Always use #' @inheritParams documentation whenever possible. Never duplicate documentation manually Never try align arguments. Never add unecessary whitepace stylistic reasons. Never modify code outside file currently implemented. spot duplicate improvement elsewhere, mention user move . touch .

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Naming: snake_case R names mapping API names internally. Reuse name whenever concept across functions. Ordering: required spatial inputs first, core behavioral params, optional feature inputs, output control params, token always last. Defaults: NULL anything optional — dropped via compact(). Non-NULL defaults omitting surprise user. Validation: every validated param gets reusable function, never inline. Shared validators go utils-*.R, function-specific stay file. Pattern: NULL early return → scalar type check → arg_match → lookup vector API value. Never duplicate validator already exists. Spatial vs tabular inputs: use sf/sfc whenever geometry involved. Use plain data.frame attribute-tables. get dedicated as_*() converter using UseMethod dispatch — recognizing snake_case column names, validating types, renaming API names, serializing via arcgisutils::as_esri_featureset().

title: CLAUDE.md
text: helperServices URL endpoint varies — point GP server root, others point directly task: asyncRoute$url → GP server root (e.g. .../Route/GPServer) — append task name httr2::req_url_path_append()$url asyncServiceArea$url → already points task (e.g. .../ServiceAreas/GPServer/GenerateServiceAreas) — use directly base_url, append Always verify printing job$base_url constructing job. task name appears twice URL, URL already task URL.

what: Writing result parsers for GP jobs
title: CLAUDE.md
text: Never write result parser seeing actual results. workflow : Implement job constructor without result_fn — default RcppSimdJson::fparse() runs returns data frame. Ask user run job share result$paramName result$dataType (vectors, full data frame). GPFeatureRecordSetLayer → try_parse(json, "/N/value") GPRecordSet → try_parse(json, "/N/value") GPBoolean / GPString → RcppSimdJson::fparse(json, query = "/N/value") GPDataFile → RcppSimdJson::fparse(json, query = "/N/value") — return file URLs, include , skip raw results JSON 0-indexed array — use numeric JSON Pointer paths ("/0/value", "/1/value", etc.) name-based paths. Write parse_<endpoint>_results(json) returning compact() named list snake_case keys derived paramName. Pass function result_fn positional argument (third arg) $new() call. token must passed named argument.

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: Finds one nearby facilities incidents based travel time distance.

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
code: find_closest_facility(   incidents,   facilities,   travel_mode = NULL,   default_target_facility_count = NULL,   travel_direction = NULL,   default_cutoff = NULL,   time_of_day = NULL,   time_of_day_usage = NULL,   u_turns = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   accumulate_impedance = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   attribute_parameter_values = NULL,   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   return_geometry = c("facilities", "incidents"),   directions_language = NULL,   directions_output_type = NULL,   directions_style = NULL,   directions_length_units = NULL,   directions_time_attribute = NULL,   output_lines = "true_shape",   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   preserve_object_id = FALSE,   return_empty_results = FALSE,   output_geometry_precision = 10,   output_geometry_precision_units = "meters",   geometry_precision = NULL,   geometry_precision_m = NULL,   locate_settings = NULL,   crs = 4326,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: incidents sf sfc object containing point geometries representing locations search . facilities sf sfc object containing point geometries representing facilities search . travel_mode Character. name travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. default_target_facility_count default NULL. integer scalar. number closest facilities find per incident. travel_direction default "away". scalar character. One "away" (away facility) "towards" (toward facility). default_cutoff default NULL. numeric scalar. travel time distance value stop searching facilities. time_of_day_usage default NULL. scalar character. One "start_time" "end_time". Specifies whether time_of_day represents departure arrival time. use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use hierarchy finding routes. Default: TRUE. restrictions Character vector. Restriction names honor. Default: NULL. attribute_parameter_values default NULL. list objects. Additional values required attribute restriction. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. return_geometry default c("facilities", "incidents"). character vector. Valid values: "cf_routes", "facilities", "incidents", "directions", "barriers", "polyline_barriers", "polygon_barriers", "traversed_edges", "traversed_junctions", "traversed_turns". Use "everything" return . directions_language Character. Language code directions (e.g., "en"). Default: "en". directions_output_type default NULL. scalar character. One "standard", "complete", "complete_no_events", "instructions_only", "summary_only", "feature_sets". directions_style default NULL. scalar character. One "desktop", "navigation", "campus". directions_length_units default NULL. scalar character. One "miles", "kilometers", "feet", "meters", "yards", "nautical_miles". directions_time_attribute default NULL. scalar character. time-based impedance attribute used direction durations. output_lines default NULL (lines). scalar character NULL. One "true_shape" "with_measure". ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid locations. Default: TRUE. preserve_object_id default FALSE. logical scalar. Preserves object IDs input locations output. return_empty_results default FALSE. logical scalar. Returns empty results instead error failure. output_geometry_precision default 10. numeric scalar. Simplification tolerance applied output geometry. output_geometry_precision_units default "meters". scalar character. Units output_geometry_precision. valid values trim_polygon_distance_units. geometry_precision default NULL. integer scalar. Decimal places x y values response geometries. geometry_precision_m default NULL. scalar character. Decimal places m-values response geometries. locate_settings default NULL. list controlling inputs located network. crs default 4326. coordinate reference system output geometries. Passed arcgisutils::as_spatial_reference(). token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: named list. Elements present depend return_geometry: cf_routes: route features incidents facilities facilities: facility features incidents: incident features direction_points: point features direction maneuvers direction_lines: line features route segments barriers: point barrier features polyline_barriers: polyline barrier features polygon_barriers: polygon barrier features traversed_edges: traversed edge features traversed_junctions: traversed junction features traversed_turns: traversed turn features messages: status warning messages service

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: API Reference

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  incidents <- st_sfc(st_point(c(-122.4496, 37.7467)), crs = 4326)  facilities <- st_sf(   Name = c("Station 11", "Station 20", "Station 24", "Station 39"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4267, 37.7486)),     st_point(c(-122.4561, 37.7513)),     st_point(c(-122.4409, 37.7533)),     st_point(c(-122.4578, 37.7407)),     crs = 4326   ) )  result <- find_closest_facility(   incidents = incidents,   facilities = facilities,   default_target_facility_count = 2,   travel_direction = "away",   default_cutoff = 3,   return_geometry = "cf_routes",   directions_length_units = "miles",   crs = 3857 )  result } # }

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: Finds best routes multiple stops using ArcGIS routing service.

title: Find Routes — find_routes
code: find_routes(   stops,   travel_mode = NULL,   start_time = NULL,   find_best_sequence = FALSE,   preserve_first_stop = TRUE,   preserve_last_stop = TRUE,   restrict_u_turns = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   impedance_attribute_name = NULL,   accumulate_attribute_names = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   barriers = NULL,   polyline_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   directions_language = "en",   directions_type = "standard",   return_geometry = c("routes", "directions"),   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: stops sf sfc object containing point geometries representing stops visit. Use as_stops() prepare stops attributes. travel_mode Character. name travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. start_time POSIXct character. time travel begins. Can "now" current time, POSIXct datetime, NULL static speeds. Default: NULL. find_best_sequence Logical. Whether reorder stops find optimized route. Default: FALSE. preserve_first_stop Logical. Whether keep first stop fixed reordering. applies find_best_sequence = TRUE. Default: TRUE. preserve_last_stop Logical. Whether keep last stop fixed reordering. applies find_best_sequence = TRUE. Default: TRUE. restrict_u_turns Character. Specifies U-turn restrictions. One : "allow_backtrack", "deadend_intersection", "deadend", "no_backtrack". Default: "allow_backtrack". use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use hierarchy finding routes. Default: TRUE. impedance_attribute_name Character. impedance use. One : "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. accumulate_attribute_names Character vector. Additional impedance values accumulate. Default: NULL. restrictions Character vector. Restriction names honor. Default: NULL. barriers Point barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polyline_barriers Line barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. directions_language Character. Language code directions (e.g., "en"). Default: "en". directions_type Character. Specifies content verbosity driving directions (directionsOutputType REST API). One : "complete", "complete_no_events", "instructions_only", "standard", "summary_only", "feature_sets". Default: "standard". return_geometry Character vector. Specifies features return output. Valid values: "routes", "directions", "stops", "barriers", "polyline_barriers", "polygon_barriers", "traversed_edges", "traversed_junctions", "traversed_turns". Default: c("routes", "directions"). ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid locations. Default: TRUE. token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token(). return_directions Logical. Whether generate driving directions. Default: TRUE.

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: list containing routing resps. elements returned depend return_geometry parameter. Possible elements include: routes: Route features directions: Driving directions. element contains compress_geometry column per-maneuver segment geometry ArcGIS compressed format. Use decode_compressed_geometry() decode sf geometries. stops: Stop features barriers: Barrier features polyline_barriers: Polyline barrier features polygon_barriers: Polygon barrier features traversed_edges: Traversed edge features traversed_junctions: Traversed junction features traversed_turns: Traversed turn features messages: Status warning messages service directions_type = "feature_sets", response includes: direction_points: sf object point features direction maneuvers direction_lines: sf object line features route segments

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: API Reference

title: Find Routes — find_routes
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  # Simple route between 3 stops stops <- st_sf(   name = c("Start", "Middle", "End"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),  # San Francisco     st_point(c(-122.0312, 37.3318)),  # Cupertino     st_point(c(-121.8863, 37.3382)),  # San Jose     crs = 4326   ) )  resp <- find_routes(stops)  # Route with time windows for deliveries delivery_stops <- st_sf(   name = c("Warehouse", "Customer A", "Customer B", "Customer C"),   time_window_start = as.POSIXct(c(     "2024-01-15 08:00:00",     "2024-01-15 09:00:00",     "2024-01-15 11:00:00",     "2024-01-15 14:00:00"   )),   time_window_end = as.POSIXct(c(     "2024-01-15 08:30:00",     "2024-01-15 10:00:00",     "2024-01-15 13:00:00",     "2024-01-15 16:00:00"   )),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),     st_point(c(-122.4083, 37.7858)),     st_point(c(-122.4313, 37.7793)),     st_point(c(-122.4000, 37.7900)),     crs = 4326   ) )  delivery_route <- find_routes(   delivery_stops,   start_time = as.POSIXct("2024-01-15 08:00:00"),   travel_mode = "Driving Time" )  # Find optimal order for stops sales_stops <- st_sf(   name = c("Office", "Client 1", "Client 2", "Client 3", "Office"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),     st_point(c(-122.4083, 37.7858)),     st_point(c(-122.4313, 37.7793)),     st_point(c(-122.4000, 37.7900)),     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),     crs = 4326   ) )  optimized_route <- find_routes(   sales_stops,   find_best_sequence = TRUE,   preserve_first_stop = TRUE,   preserve_last_stop = TRUE )  # Route with barriers barrier_pts <- st_sfc(   st_point(c(-122.4150, 37.7800)),   crs = 4326 )  route_with_barriers <- find_routes(   stops,   barriers = barrier_pts )  # Accumulate multiple impedances multi_impedance_route <- find_routes(   stops,   impedance_attribute_name = "travel_time",   accumulate_attribute_names = c("miles", "kilometers") ) } # }

title: Find Routes (Async) — find_routes_job
text: Submits asynchronous geoprocessing job find best routes stops using ArcGIS /FindRoutes GP service.

title: Find Routes (Async) — find_routes_job
code: find_routes_job(   stops,   travel_mode = NULL,   measurement_units = NULL,   analysis_region = NULL,   reorder_stops = FALSE,   preserve_terminal_stops = NULL,   return_to_start = NULL,   use_time_windows = NULL,   time_of_day = NULL,   uturn_at_junctions = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   time_impedance = NULL,   distance_impedance = NULL,   route_shape = NULL,   populate_route_edges = NULL,   populate_directions = NULL,   directions_language = NULL,   directions_distance_units = NULL,   directions_style_name = NULL,   output_format = "feature_set",   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Find Routes (Async) — find_routes_job
text: stops sf sfc object containing point geometries. Use as_stops() prepare stops attributes route_name, time_window_start, time_window_end. travel_mode Character. name ID travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. measurement_units Character. Units reporting total travel time distance. One : "meters", "kilometers", "feet", "yards", "miles", "nautical_miles", "seconds", "minutes", "hours", "days". Default: NULL (API default: "minutes"). analysis_region Character. Region analysis. One : "europe", "japan", "korea", "middle_east_and_africa", "north_america", "south_america", "south_asia", "thailand". Default: NULL (auto-detected). reorder_stops Logical. Reorder stops find optimal route (TSP). Default: FALSE. preserve_terminal_stops Character. terminal stops preserve reorder_stops = TRUE. One : "first", "last", "first_and_last", "none". Default: NULL (API default: "first"). return_to_start Logical. Whether route return starting location. Default: NULL (API default: TRUE). use_time_windows Logical. Whether honour time windows stops. Default: NULL (auto-detected stops attributes). time_of_day POSIXct. departure time routes. NULL, static average speeds used. Default: NULL. uturn_at_junctions Character. U-turn policy junctions. One : "allow_backtrack", "deadend_intersection", "deadend", "no_backtrack". Default: NULL. use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use street hierarchy finding routes. Default: NULL (API default: TRUE). restrictions Character vector. Restriction names apply. Default: NULL. impedance Character. Impedance type. One : "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. time_impedance Character. Time-based impedance. One : "minutes", "travel_time", "walk_time", "truck_minutes", "truck_travel_time". Default: NULL. distance_impedance Character. Distance-based impedance. One : "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. route_shape Character. Shape output route features. One : "true_shape", "true_shape_with_measures", "straight_line", "none". Default: NULL (API default: "true_shape"). populate_route_edges Logical. Generate edges route. Default: NULL (API default: FALSE). populate_directions Logical. Generate driving directions. Default: NULL (API default: FALSE). directions_language Character. Language code directions. Default: NULL (API default: "en"). directions_distance_units Character. Units distances directions. One : "feet", "kilometers", "meters", "miles", "nautical_miles", "yards". Default: NULL. directions_style_name Character. Formatting style directions. One : "desktop", "navigation". Default: NULL. output_format Character. Format output features. One : "feature_set", "json_file", "geojson_file". Default: "feature_set". ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid input locations. Default: TRUE. point_barriers Point barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. line_barriers Line barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

title: Find Routes (Async) — find_routes_job
text: find_routes_job R6 object inheriting arcgisutils::arc_gp_job. Call $run() execute $result() retrieve output.

title: Find Routes (Async) — find_routes_job
text: API Reference

title: Find Routes (Async) — find_routes_job
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  stops <- st_sf(   name = c("Stop 1", "Stop 2", "Stop 3"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(145.066, -37.865)),     st_point(c(145.105, -37.819)),     st_point(c(145.120, -37.800)),     crs = 4326   ) )  job <- find_routes_job(stops) job$start() result <- job$results } # }

title: Solve Service Area — find_service_areas
text: Solve Service Area

title: Solve Service Area — find_service_areas
code: find_service_areas(   facilities,   default_breaks = c(5, 10, 15),   travel_mode = NULL,   travel_direction = "away",   time_of_day = NULL,   output_polygons = "simplified",   split_polygons_at_breaks = TRUE,   overlap_polygons = TRUE,   merge_similar_polygon_ranges = FALSE,   trim_outer_polygons = TRUE,   output_lines = NULL,   split_lines_at_breaks = TRUE,   overlap_lines = TRUE,   return_geometry = "service_areas",   u_turns = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   accumulate_impedance = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   trim_polygon_distance = 100,   trim_polygon_distance_units = "meters",   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   output_geometry_precision = 10,   output_geometry_precision_units = "meters",   crs = 4326,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Solve Service Area — find_service_areas
text: facilities sf sfc object containing point geometries representing facilities around service areas generated. default_breaks default c(5, 10, 15). numeric vector specifying size number service areas generate facility. Units determined impedance parameter. travel_mode Character. name travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. travel_direction default "away". scalar character. One "away" (away facility) "towards" (toward facility). output_polygons default "simplified". scalar character NULL (polygons). One "simplified" "detailed". split_polygons_at_breaks default TRUE. logical scalar. TRUE, service areas appear rings breaks. FALSE, area disk facility break. overlap_polygons default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service area polygons different facilities can overlap. merge_similar_polygon_ranges default FALSE. logical scalar. Whether service area polygons different facilities break value merged single polygon. trim_outer_polygons default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service areas trimmed lie within distance network. Ignored use_hierarchy = TRUE. output_lines default NULL (lines). scalar character NULL. One "true_shape" "with_measure". split_lines_at_breaks default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service area lines split break values. overlap_lines default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service area lines different facilities can overlap. return_geometry default "service_areas". character vector. Valid values: "service_areas", "sa_lines", "facilities", "barriers", "polyline_barriers", "polygon_barriers". use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use hierarchy finding routes. Default: TRUE. restrictions Character vector. Restriction names honor. Default: NULL. trim_polygon_distance default 100. integer scalar. distance within service area polygon extends network. trim_polygon_distance_units default "meters". scalar character. Units trim_polygon_distance. One "meters", "kilometers", "feet", "miles", "nautical_miles", "yards". polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid locations. Default: TRUE. output_geometry_precision default 10. numeric scalar. Simplification tolerance applied output geometry. output_geometry_precision_units default "meters". scalar character. Units output_geometry_precision. valid values trim_polygon_distance_units. crs default 4326. coordinate reference system output geometries. Passed arcgisutils::as_spatial_reference(). token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

text: list containing service area results.

title: Solve Last Mile Delivery (Async) — last_mile_delivery
text: Submits asynchronous geoprocessing job solve last-mile delivery problem using ArcGIS /SolveLastMileDelivery GP service. Last Mile Delivery specialized vehicle routing problem creates geographically clustered delivery routes minimize fleet operating costs.

title: Solve Last Mile Delivery (Async) — last_mile_delivery
code: last_mile_delivery(   orders,   depots,   routes = NULL,   order_specialties = NULL,   route_specialties = NULL,   zones = NULL,   travel_mode = NULL,   analysis_region = NULL,   ignore_network_location_fields = FALSE,   ignore_invalid_order_locations = FALSE,   earliest_route_start_date = NULL,   earliest_route_start_time = NULL,   time_zone_usage_for_time_fields = NULL,   max_route_total_time = NULL,   sequence_gap = NULL,   time_units = NULL,   distance_units = NULL,   route_shape = NULL,   populate_directions = FALSE,   directions_language = NULL,   save_route_data = FALSE,   save_output_network_analysis_layer = FALSE,   output_format = "feature_set",   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Solve Last Mile Delivery (Async) — last_mile_delivery
text: orders sf object containing point geometries representing delivery pickup locations. Use as_lmd_orders() prepare validated attributes. depots sf sfc object containing point geometries representing depot locations. Prepared as_stops(). routes data.frame describing vehicle driver characteristics. Use as_lmd_routes() prepare validated attributes. Default: NULL. order_specialties data.frame mapping orders specialties require, columns order_name specialty_name. Default: NULL. route_specialties data.frame mapping routes specialties support, columns route_name specialty_name. Default: NULL. zones sf sfc polygon object delineating work territories, carrying name attribute. Use as_lmd_zones() prepare. Default: NULL. travel_mode Character. name ID travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. analysis_region Character. Region analysis. One : "europe", "japan", "korea", "middle_east_and_africa", "north_america", "south_america", "south_asia", "thailand". Default: NULL (auto-detected). ignore_network_location_fields Logical. Whether network location fields inputs ignored. Default: FALSE. ignore_invalid_order_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid orders instead failing. Default: FALSE. earliest_route_start_date Date. Default earliest start date applied routes whose earliest_start_date attribute missing. Default: NULL. earliest_route_start_time hms character "hh:mm:ss" value giving default earliest start time applied routes whose earliest_start_time attribute missing. Default: NULL. time_zone_usage_for_time_fields Character. Time zone used date-time input fields. One : "geo_local", "utc". Default: NULL (API default: "geo_local"). max_route_total_time Numeric. Default maximum allowed total time route, applied routes whose max_total_time attribute missing. Interpreted time_units. Default: NULL. sequence_gap Integer. Gap numerical values leave Sequence attribute adjacent orders analysis solved. Default: NULL (API default: 1). time_units Character. Units time-based attribute values. One : "seconds", "minutes", "hours", "days". Default: NULL (API default: "minutes"). distance_units Character. Units distance-based attribute values. One : "miles", "kilometers", "meters", "feet", "yards", "nautical_miles". Default: NULL (API default: "miles"). route_shape Character. Geometry type output route lines. One : "true_shape_with_measures", "straight_line", "none". Default: NULL (API default: "straight_line"). populate_directions Logical. Whether generate driving directions route. Default: FALSE. directions_language Character. Language code directions (e.g. "en"). Default: NULL. save_route_data Logical. Whether save results .zip file geodatabase. Default: FALSE. save_output_network_analysis_layer Logical. Whether analysis settings saved network analysis layer package file. Default: FALSE. output_format Character. Format output features. One : "feature_set", "json_file", "geojson_file". Default: "feature_set". point_barriers Point barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. line_barriers Line barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

text: last_mile_delivery_job R6 object inheriting arcgisutils::arc_gp_job. Call $start() submit $results retrieve output.

title: Route Vehicles — route_vehicles
text: Solves vehicle routing problem (VRP) find effective routes fleet vehicles visiting set orders.

title: Route Vehicles — route_vehicles
code: route_vehicles(   orders,   depots,   routes = NULL,   travel_mode = NULL,   locate_settings = NULL,   analysis_region = NULL,   time_zone_usage_for_time_fields = NULL,   default_date = NULL,   breaks = NULL,   time_units = NULL,   distance_units = NULL,   time_window_factor = NULL,   spatially_cluster_routes = TRUE,   route_zones = NULL,   route_renewals = NULL,   order_pairs = NULL,   excess_transit_factor = NULL,   uturn_policy = NULL,   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   use_hierarchy_in_analysis = TRUE,   restrictions = NULL,   attribute_parameter_values = NULL,   time_impedance = NULL,   distance_impedance = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   populate_route_lines = TRUE,   route_line_simplification_tolerance = NULL,   populate_directions = FALSE,   directions_language = NULL,   directions_style_name = NULL,   save_route_data = FALSE,   save_output_layer = FALSE,   populate_stop_shapes = FALSE,   ignore_invalid_order_locations = FALSE,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Route Vehicles — route_vehicles
text: orders sf sfc object containing point geometries representing locations visit. depots sf sfc object containing point geometries representing depot locations. routes default NULL. data.frame describing vehicle driver characteristics. Use as_routes() prepare validated attributes. travel_mode Character. name travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. locate_settings default NULL. list controlling inputs located network. analysis_region default NULL. scalar character. One "europe", "japan", "korea", "middle_east_and_africa", "north_america", "south_america", "south_asia", "thailand". Speeds analysis specified. time_zone_usage_for_time_fields default NULL. scalar character. One "geo_local" "utc". Time zone used date-time input fields. default_date default NULL. POSIXt character scalar. date routes start. date portion used. breaks default NULL. data.frame rest period definitions routes. time_units default NULL. scalar character. One "seconds", "minutes", "hours", "days". Units time-based attribute values. distance_units default NULL. scalar character. One "miles", "kilometers", "meters", "feet", "yards", "nautical_miles". Units distance-based attribute values. time_window_factor default NULL. scalar character. One "low", "medium", "high". Importance honoring time windows. spatially_cluster_routes default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether orders assigned route spatially clustered. route_zones default NULL. sf sfc polygon object delineating work territories routes. route_renewals default NULL. data.frame intermediate depot renewal locations routes. order_pairs default NULL. data.frame pairing pickup delivery orders. excess_transit_factor default NULL. scalar character. One "low", "medium", "high". Importance reducing excess transit time order pairs. uturn_policy default NULL. scalar character. One "allow_uturn", "allow_dead_ends_and_intersections_only", "allow_dead_ends_only", "no_uturns". polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. use_hierarchy_in_analysis default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether use street network hierarchy finding routes. restrictions Character vector. Restriction names honor. Default: NULL. attribute_parameter_values default NULL. list objects providing additional values required attribute restriction. time_impedance default NULL. scalar character. Time-based impedance. One "travel_time", "minutes", "walk_time", "truck_minutes", "truck_travel_time". distance_impedance default NULL. scalar character. Distance-based impedance. One "miles", "kilometers". impedance default NULL. scalar character. impedance type. One "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". populate_route_lines default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether output routes include exact street shape. route_line_simplification_tolerance default NULL. numeric scalar. Simplification tolerance route geometry. populate_directions default FALSE. logical scalar. Whether generate driving directions route. directions_language default NULL. scalar character. Language code directions (e.g. "en"). directions_style_name default NULL. scalar character. One "desktop", "navigation", "campus". save_route_data default FALSE. logical scalar. Whether save results .zip file geodatabase. save_output_layer default FALSE. logical scalar. Whether save analysis network analysis layer package. populate_stop_shapes default FALSE. logical scalar. Whether output stops include point geometries. ignore_invalid_order_locations default FALSE. logical scalar. Whether ignore invalid orders instead failing. token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

title: Route Vehicles — route_vehicles
text: named list: unassigned_stops: orders assigned route stops: assigned stop features route sequence information routes: route features geometry cost attributes directions: driving directions (populate_directions = TRUE) solve_succeeded: logical indicating whether solve completed usage_cost: list numObjects credits used messages: status warning messages service

title: Route Vehicles — route_vehicles

title: Route Vehicles — route_vehicles
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  orders <- st_sf(   name = c("Order 1", "Order 2"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-0.1891, 51.5254)),     st_point(c(-0.1744, 51.5353)),     crs = 4326   ) )  depots <- st_sf(   name = "Depot1",   geometry = st_sfc(st_point(c(-0.2, 51.5)), crs = 4326) )  routes <- data.frame(   name = "Truck1",   start_depot_name = "Depot1",   end_depot_name = "Depot1",   capacities = "40000" )  result <- route_vehicles(orders, depots, routes) } # }

title: Generate Service Areas (Async) — solve_service_areas_job
text: Submits asynchronous geoprocessing job generate service areas around facilities using ArcGIS /GenerateServiceAreas GP service.

title: Generate Service Areas (Async) — solve_service_areas_job
code: solve_service_areas_job(   facilities,   break_values = NULL,   break_units = NULL,   travel_mode = NULL,   travel_direction = NULL,   time_of_day = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   uturn_at_junctions = NULL,   polygons_for_multiple_facilities = NULL,   polygon_overlap_type = NULL,   detailed_polygons = NULL,   polygon_trim_distance = NULL,   polygon_simplification_tolerance = NULL,   polygon_detail = NULL,   output_type = NULL,   analysis_region = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   time_impedance = NULL,   distance_impedance = NULL,   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   output_format = "feature_set",   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Generate Service Areas (Async) — solve_service_areas_job
text: facilities sf sfc object containing point geometries representing facilities around service areas generated. break_values Numeric vector. Service area sizes. Units determined break_units. Default: NULL (API default: 5 10 15). break_units Character. Units break_values. One : "meters", "kilometers", "feet", "yards", "miles", "nautical_miles", "seconds", "minutes", "hours", "days". Default: NULL (API default: "minutes"). travel_mode Character. name ID travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. travel_direction Character. Direction travel relative facilities. One : "away", "towards". Default: NULL (API default: "away"). time_of_day POSIXct. departure time routes. NULL, static average speeds used. Default: NULL. use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use street hierarchy finding routes. Default: NULL (API default: TRUE). uturn_at_junctions Character. U-turn policy junctions. One : "allow_backtrack", "deadend_intersection", "deadend", "no_backtrack". Default: NULL. polygons_for_multiple_facilities Character. service area polygons multiple facilities generated. One : "overlapping", "not_overlapping", "merge". Default: NULL (API default: "overlapping"). polygon_overlap_type Character. Whether polygons rings disks. One : "rings", "disks". Default: NULL (API default: "rings"). detailed_polygons Logical. Generate detailed polygons. Default: NULL (API default: FALSE). polygon_trim_distance List elements distance (numeric) units (character). Trim polygons within distance network. Default: NULL. polygon_simplification_tolerance List elements distance (numeric) units (character). Simplification tolerance output polygons. Default: NULL. polygon_detail Character. Level detail output polygons. One : "standard", "generalized", "high". Default: NULL (API default: "standard"). output_type Character. Type output generate. One : "polygons", "lines", "polygons_and_lines". Default: NULL (API default: "polygons"). analysis_region Character. Region analysis. One : "europe", "japan", "korea", "middle_east_and_africa", "north_america", "south_america", "south_asia", "thailand". Default: NULL (auto-detected). restrictions Character vector. Restriction names apply. Default: NULL. impedance Character. Impedance type. One : "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. time_impedance Character. Time-based impedance. One : "minutes", "travel_time", "walk_time", "truck_minutes", "truck_travel_time". Default: NULL. distance_impedance Character. Distance-based impedance. One : "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid input locations. Default: TRUE. output_format Character. Format output features. One : "feature_set", "json_file", "geojson_file". Default: "feature_set". point_barriers Point barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. line_barriers Line barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

Time zone used date-time input fields. One : "geo_local", "utc". Default: NULL (API default: "geo_local"). default_date POSIXct. date routes start. date portion used. Default: NULL. time_units Character. Units time-based attribute values. One : "seconds", "minutes", "hours", "days". Default: NULL (API default: "minutes"). distance_units Character. Units distance-based attribute values. One : "miles", "kilometers", "meters", "feet", "yards", "nautical_miles". Default: NULL (API default: "miles"). time_window_factor Character. Importance honoring time windows. One : "low", "medium", "high". Default: NULL (API default: "medium"). spatially_cluster_routes Logical. Whether orders assigned route spatially clustered. Default: TRUE. route_zones sf sfc polygon object delineating work territories routes. Default: NULL. route_renewals data.frame intermediate depot renewal locations. Default: NULL. order_pairs data.frame pairing pickup delivery orders. Default: NULL. excess_transit_factor Character. Importance reducing excess transit time order pairs. One : "low", "medium", "high". Default: NULL (API default: "medium"). uturn_policy Character. U-turn policy junctions. One : "allow_uturn", "allow_dead_ends_and_intersections_only", "allow_dead_ends_only", "no_uturns". Default: NULL. restrictions Character vector. Restriction names apply. Default: NULL. impedance Character. Impedance type. One : "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. time_impedance Character. Time-based impedance. One : "minutes", "travel_time", "walk_time", "truck_minutes", "truck_travel_time". Default: NULL. distance_impedance Character. Distance-based impedance. One : "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. use_hierarchy_in_analysis Logical. Whether use street network hierarchy finding routes. Default: TRUE. populate_route_lines Logical. Whether output routes include exact street shape. Default: TRUE. route_line_simplification_tolerance Numeric. Simplification tolerance route geometry. Default: NULL. populate_directions Logical. Whether generate driving directions route. Default: FALSE. directions_language Character. Language code directions (e.g. "en"). Default: NULL. directions_style_name Character. Formatting style directions. One : "desktop", "navigation", "campus". Default: NULL. save_route_data Logical. Whether save results .zip file geodatabase. Default: FALSE. save_output_layer Logical. Whether save analysis network analysis layer package. Default: FALSE. populate_stop_shapes Logical. Whether output stops include point geometries. Default: FALSE. output_format Character. Format output features. One : "feature_set", "json_file", "geojson_file". Default: "feature_set". ignore_invalid_order_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid orders instead failing. Default: FALSE. point_barriers Point barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. line_barriers Line barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

title: Solve Vehicle Routing Problem (Async) — solve_vrp_job
text: solve_vrp_job R6 object inheriting arcgisutils::arc_gp_job. Call $start() submit $results retrieve output.

title: Solve Vehicle Routing Problem (Async) — solve_vrp_job
text: API Reference

title: Solve Vehicle Routing Problem (Async) — solve_vrp_job
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  orders <- st_sf(   name = c("Order 1", "Order 2"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-0.1891, 51.5254)),     st_point(c(-0.1744, 51.5353)),     crs = 4326   ) )  depots <- st_sf(   name = "Depot1",   geometry = st_sfc(st_point(c(-0.2, 51.5)), crs = 4326) )  job <- solve_vrp_job(orders, depots) job$start() result <- job$results } # }

title: Travel Cost Matrix — travel_cost_matrix
text: Creates origin-destination cost matrix containing travel cost every origin destination.

title: Travel Cost Matrix — travel_cost_matrix
code: travel_cost_matrix(   origins,   destinations = origins,   travel_mode = NULL,   default_cutoff = NULL,   default_target_destination_count = NULL,   output_type = NULL,   time_of_day = NULL,   u_turns = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   accumulate_impedance = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   attribute_parameter_values = NULL,   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   return_geometry = character(0),   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   return_empty_results = FALSE,   geometry_precision = NULL,   locate_settings = NULL,   crs = 4326,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Travel Cost Matrix — travel_cost_matrix
text: origins sf sfc object containing point geometries representing starting points. destinations default origins. sf sfc object containing point geometries representing ending points. default_cutoff default NULL. numeric scalar. travel time distance value stop searching facilities. default_target_destination_count default NULL. integer scalar. maximum number destinations find per origin. output_type default NULL. scalar character. One "no_lines", "straight_lines", "true_shape". Controls whether route geometry returned. attribute_parameter_values default NULL. list objects. Additional values required attribute restriction. return_geometry default character(0). character vector. Valid values: "origins", "destinations", "barriers", "polyline_barriers", "polygon_barriers". return_empty_results default FALSE. logical scalar. Returns empty results instead error failure. geometry_precision default NULL. integer scalar. Decimal places x y values response geometries. locate_settings default NULL. list controlling inputs located network. crs default 4326. coordinate reference system output geometries. Passed arcgisutils::as_spatial_reference().

title: Travel Cost Matrix — travel_cost_matrix
text: named list. Elements present depend return_geometry output_type: od_lines: OD cost matrix features origins: origin features destinations: destination features barriers: point barrier features polyline_barriers: polyline barrier features polygon_barriers: polygon barrier features messages: status warning messages service

title: Travel Cost Matrix — travel_cost_matrix
text: API Reference

title: Travel Cost Matrix — travel_cost_matrix
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  origins <- st_sfc(   st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),   st_point(c(-122.4313, 37.7793)),   crs = 4326 )  destinations <- st_sfc(   st_point(c(-122.4083, 37.7858)),   st_point(c(-122.4000, 37.7900)),   st_point(c(-122.4561, 37.7513)),   crs = 4326 )  result <- travel_cost_matrix(   origins = origins,   destinations = destinations )  result } # }
